name: @gobing-ai/ts-libs
description: Monorepo of TypeScript libraries — shared runtime abstractions, database layer, infrastructure backbone and etc
author: Robin Min <minlongbing@gmail.com>

scripts.autofix: bun run format && bun run typecheck
scripts.test-post-check: spur rule run --preset spur-dev --rule coverage-gate --fail-on warning
scripts.spur-check: bun run lint && bun run test-pre-check && bun run test && bun run test-post-check
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run test
scripts.test-post-check:full: spur rule run --preset spur-dev --rule coverage-gate --fail-on warning --verbose
scripts.spur-check:full: bun run lint && bun run test-pre-check:full && bun run test:full && bun run test-post-check:full
scripts.check:full: bun run lint && bun run test:full
